JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action With Request To Reopen Case
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK CATO'S Motion And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action With Request To Reopen Case is off calendar. Insufficient service per CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185.

Mtn And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action With Request To Reopen Case
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK CATO's Motion And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action With Request To Reopen Case is off calendar because: (1) the Court did not receive a courtesy copy of the motion in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B; (2) there is no proof of service; and (3) the motion was untimely filed on May 9, 2013 and does not comply with CCP 1005. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MARK A. CATO, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK CATO's Motion And Objection To Court Order Dismissing Entire Action is Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served on April 30, 2013. Moving party only provided 2 court days notice. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)
